message:
fix(convoy): stranded scan now checks completion instead of logging

The stranded scan third branch (tracked_count > 0, ready_count == 0)
previously just logged needs agent review and never checked if all
tracked issues were closed. This caused completed convoys to pile up
indefinitely when the event poll missed close events (daemon restart,
Dolt latency, etc). 43 of 50 open convoys were actually completed.

Now calls checkConvoyCompletion() which runs gt convoy check - a
no-op for genuinely stuck convoys, auto-closes completed ones.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
